caption: A white airplane with red accents on its tail and fuselage is positioned on a paved runway adjacent to a green grassy field under an overcast sky. The aircraft features a T-tail design and engines mounted on the rear of the fuselage. A small white and red piece of ground equipment stands on the runway near the plane's wing. In the upper right corner of each scene, a red circular logo containing the white text "13" is visible. As the sequence progresses, the airplane remains stationary, but a visible plume of white exhaust or vapor emerges from the rear engines and drifts across the runway toward the left. The aircraft's landing lights are illuminated, casting a bright glow on the pavement beneath the nose.
